inputs.businessContext: Muskingum routing - upstream inflow at current time step

inputs.label: Previous Outflow

inputs.label: Time Step
inputs.businessContext: Routing time step Δt, must be less than K

inputs.label: Storage Constant K
inputs.businessContext: Muskingum parameter K, travel time of flood wave through reach

businessContext_i18n.en: Muskingum parameter K, travel time of flood wave through reach

inputs.label: Weighting Factor x
inputs.businessContext: Muskingum parameter x, 0 ≤ x ≤ 0.5, typical 0.1-0.3 for natural streams

businessContext_i18n.en: Muskingum parameter x, 0 ≤ x ≤ 0.5, typical 0.1-0.3 for natural streams
